leadText: Poni Plains (Japanese: ポニの広野 Poni Plains) is a location on Poni Island in Alola, located north of Poni Grove, southeast of Poni Meadow and Plains Grotto, and southwest of Poni Coast. In Pokémon Ultra Sun and Ultra Moon, Anabel and Looker will block the way to Poni Coast until the Ultra Beast incident in Poni Grove is resolved.

sections.title: Items
sections.text: Contents 1 Items 1.1 Berry pile 1.2 Dropped after ambush encounters 1.3 Found in smashed rocks 1.4 Zygarde Cube Items [ edit | edit source ] Item Location Games Carbos At the southeastern-most point S M US UM TM60 ( Quash ) From Ace Trainer Cole for defeating him S M US UM PP Max At the base of the palm tree north and slightly east of the Poni Grove entrance (hidden) S M US UM Star Piece In the rocky area in the northwest, down the eastern ledge (requires Tauros Charge ) S M Comet Shard In the rocky area in the northwest, down the eastern ledge (requires Tauros Charge ) US UM TM24 ( Thunderbolt ) In the rocky area in the northwest, down the western ledge (requires Tauros Charge ) S M Power Anklet In the rocky area in the northwest, down the western ledge (requires Tauros Charge ) US UM Key Stone From Dexio in front of the Poni Meadow entrance after defeating him US UM Alakazite From Dexio in front of the Poni Meadow entrance after defeating him US UM X Defense On a ledge in the northeast, east of the Poni Meadow entrance S M US UM Red Card From Looker near the Poni Coast entrance, after finishing the Ultra Beast mission in Poni Grove US UM Berry pile [ edit | edit source ] The Berry pile can have two sizes: a small pile that yields three random Berries or a large pile that yields four to five Berries. The first Berry in a large pile is fixed. In large piles, the player will always find a high level Crabrawler hiding among the Berries that the player must defeat in order to collect them; small piles only occasionally have low level Crabrawler hiding among the Berries. The Berry pile regenerates daily.
